footer.description: Sacred Cow Blessing brings Pearl, a gentle Brahma cow, to homes, temples, weddings, businesses, and events across Dallas-Fort Worth for cow blessings, Gau Pravesh, cow puja, sacred ceremonies, and meaningful celebrations.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Sacred Cow Blessing. A beautiful start for your new home.

hero.body: We bring a gentle Brahma cow to your doorstep for a unique and meaningful blessing. Perfect for families starting their next chapter in Texas.

tradition.title: The Sacredness of Gau Pravesh
tradition.imageAlt: Gentle Brahma cow prepared for a sacred blessing
paragraphs: In many traditions, the cow is seen as a symbol of peace and motherhood. Having her step into your home first is a simple, beautiful way to bring good energy to your new space. We make it easy for families here in DFW to share in this peaceful ceremony.
Our service bridges ancient heritage with contemporary homeownership, providing a seamless and respectful experience for your family's new beginning.

experience.title: What to Expect

steps.title: Tell us about your ceremony
steps.body: Share your date, location, and the type of ceremony or gathering you are planning.

steps.title: Prepare for Pearl’s Visit
steps.body: We’ll confirm the timing, location, and setup before Pearl’s visit.

steps.title: A peaceful visit
steps.body: On the day of, Pearl and a handler will arrive and guide you through the whole process. It's calm, respectful, and special for the whole family.

experience.ceremonyStepOneExtra: Pearl can be included in many meaningful moments, including Griha Pravesh, pujas, house blessings, business openings, temple events, and family celebrations.

images.alt: Griha Pravesh ceremony details cow rental

pricing.title: Simple Pricing
pricing.body: Simple pricing for Pearl’s ceremony visit, with optional photo and video add-ons coming soon.
pricing.cardBody: Includes Pearl, her handler, arrival coordination, and includes first hour on-site.
pricing.note: Travel fees may apply depending on location.

addons.title: Professional Photography
addons.body: Capture the meaningful moments with polished ceremony photos your family can keep and share.

addons.title: Professional Videography
addons.body: Preserve Pearl’s visit and your ceremony with a professionally filmed video.

inquiry.title: Invite Pearl to Your Ceremony or Event
inquiry.body: Planning a housewarming puja, pooja, Griha Pravesh, or Gau Mata blessing? Share your ceremony date, city, and preferred time, and our team will help coordinate to meet your needs.

fields.name: Full Name
fields.notesPlaceholder: Feel free to add any extra info here

inquiry.sentMessage: Thank you. We received your inquiry and will follow up to confirm availability.
inquiry.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again or use the chat button to reach us.

finalCta.title: A beautiful start for your new home.
finalCta.body: Join the hundreds of families in Texas who have started their lives in a new space with the gentle blessings of Gaumata.

items.question: Do you only do housewarmings?
items.answer: No! we perform cow puja / pooja for any sacred occasion. Temple visits, community festivals, coming-of-age ceremonies, weddings, business openings, school cultural days, and wellness events. If you want to invite the energy of the sacred cow, we can make it happen. Contact us to plan your puja.

items.question: What is a cow blessing?
items.answer: A cow blessing is a gentle sacred-cow visit for a meaningful milestone or ceremony — a new home, wedding, family celebration, business opening, temple/community event, or any occasion where you want to welcome peace, auspicious energy, and Pearl’s calming presence.

items.question: Where do you travel in DFW?
items.answer: We serve the entire Dallas-Fort Worth area, including Frisco, Plano, McKinney, and surrounding suburbs.

items.question: How far in advance should I book?
items.answer: We suggest reaching out 2-3 weeks in advance to ensure we can find a time that works for you.

hero.title: Ancient heritage, held with modern care.
hero.body: Sacred Cow Blessing exists to make Gau Pravesh feel peaceful, respectful, and beautifully coordinated for families beginning a new chapter in Texas.

cards.title: Reverence
cards.text: Every ceremony is approached with warmth, seriousness, and respect for family tradition.

cards.title: Ease
cards.text: We handle the visit details so your household can focus on the prayerful moment.

cards.title: Care
cards.text: We plan around access, cleanup, elders, children, guests, and the feeling of the home.

hero.title: A calm process for a meaningful first step.
hero.body: From timing to arrival to Pearl’s calm departure, the experience is simple, spacious, respectful, and family-first.

cards.title: Before the day
cards.text: Share your date, address, access notes, priest timing, and anything your family wants us to know.

cards.title: During the visit
cards.text: Pearl arrives calmly, the entry is protected, and the family has room to observe the blessing.

cards.title: After the blessing
cards.text: We guide Pearl out calmly and respectfully, so your family can continue the rest of the ceremony or celebration.

hero.title: Invite Pearl to your ceremony or event.
hero.body: Share your date, location, and occasion — from house blessings and pujas to weddings, temple events, business openings, school programs, and community gatherings across DFW.

locations.title: Sacred Cow Blessing in
locations.body: Bringing the peaceful energy of Pearl to homes, temples, businesses, schools, weddings, and family celebrations across the Dallas-Fort Worth area.
locations.serviceBody: We bring the Gau Pravesh tradition directly to your doorstep across Dallas-Fort Worth and nearby North Texas communities.
locations.supportBody: We respectfully provide a cow visit and experienced handler for families already observing Hindu house-blessing traditions such as Gau Puja, Gau Pravesh, or Griha Pravesh in the DFW area.
locations.imageAlt: Pearl the gentle Brahma cow prepared for a sacred blessing visit
locations.journeyTitle: We'll bring Pearl to you, with care and tradition.
locations.journeyBody: Our process is designed to be grounded and helpful. We understand the significance of your next milestone or celebration in Texas, and we help make Pearl's visit feel seamless, calm, and joyful for your family.

features.title: Sacred Presence
features.text: We'll bring Pearl to your location, ready for your family's ceremony, milestone, wedding, business opening, or new-home blessing.

features.title: Grounded Guidance
features.text: Texas-friendly coordination that keeps the experience simple, calm, respectful, and meaningful for everyone gathered.

locations.ctaBody: Our DFW team is here to help coordinate Pearl's presence for housewarmings, weddings, temple and community events, business openings, school cultural days, and other sacred occasions.
locations.ctaStrong: Share your city, date, and ceremony notes.

hero.title: Sacred Cow Blessing Blog
hero.body: Simple guides for families planning cow blessing visits, Hindu ceremonies, house blessings, pujas, and temple events in Dallas-Fort Worth.

posts.title: Meet Pearl, Our Gentle Brahman Cow for Ceremonies in Dallas-Fort Worth
posts.text: Pearl is the gentle purebred Brahman cow families welcome into house blessings, pujas, Griha Pravesh ceremonies, temple events, and meaningful celebrations across Dallas-Fort Worth. Learn her story and why her calm presence makes each visit so special.

posts.title: Cow Blessing for Indian Housewarming Ceremonies in Dallas-Fort Worth
posts.text: For many families, welcoming a cow into a new home is a meaningful part of an Indian housewarming or Griha Pravesh ceremony. Learn how Pearl’s visit works, what to prepare, and how we support the day while your family or priest leads the ceremony.

posts.title: Preparing Your Home for a Blessing
posts.text: Essential steps to create an auspicious environment for the arrival of grace, from entryway flow to family comfort.

posts.title: The Five Elements & Sacred Cows
posts.text: Understanding the elemental connection between Gaumata, the natural world, and a peaceful household.
